content.name: ap_national_id_number
content.label: National ID NO.

content.name: ap_mobile_number
content.label: Mobile Telephone Number

Greetings! My name is [replace_value]. I am an ENUMERATOR/ WARD OFFICER/ AGRIPRENEUR working for the Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Development. 
 All Farmer Households have been  selected to participate in the registration. Your household is one of the farming household  in this Ward. The information obtained from the registration will be used for planning at both the national and county level. The information provided by your household will be treated in strict confidence as provided by the law. 
I therefore would like to ask you some questions as a responsible member of this household. These questions will take some time to complete and therefore I will appreciate your patience.

Before we start the interview, I wish to inform you about some legal issues about giving information to the government. It is very important that you understand these legal provisions, and we will only proceed once you confirm their understanding.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         1. Under Section 129 of the Penal Code Whoever gives to any person employed in the public service any information which he knows or believes to be false, intending thereby to cause, or knowing it to be likely that he will thereby cause, the person employed in the public service - (a) to do or omit anything which the person employed in the public service ought not to do or omit if the true state of facts respecting which such information is given were known to him; or (b) to use the lawful power of the person employed in the public service to the injury or annoyance of any person, is guilty of a misdemeanour and is liable to imprisonment for three years;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. Under Section 353 of the Penal Code, any person who knowingly and fraudulently utters a false document is guilty of an offence of the same kind and is liable to the same punishment as if he had forged the thing in question.
Have you clearly understood the above mentioned legal implications?
content.name: understood_legal

content.label: Do you have any questions?
content.name: have_any_questions
proceed_with_interview
content.label: Do you now allow me to proceed with the interview?
